subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This is Thy servant and the son of Thy servant, who from his tender years hath suckled at the breast of Thy bounty and hath been enkindled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا عبدک و ابن عبدک الذی رضع منذ نعومه اظفاره من ثدی عنایتک و اشتعل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation
